title: Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes
content: Key standards: (1) HbA1c target <7% for most non-pregnant adults. <8% acceptable for elderly, comorbidities, or risk of hypoglycemia. (2) First-line therapy: metformin unless contraindicated (eGFR <30). (3) SGLT-2 inhibitors or GLP-1 agonists recommended for patients with established CVD, CKD, or HF. (4) BP target <130/80 mmHg. (5) Statin therapy for patients ≥40 years with DM. (6) Annual screening: HbA1c, lipids, urine albumin, eGFR, foot exam, ophthalmology referral.
reference: American Diabetes Association. Diabetes Care 2024;47(Suppl 1):S1-321. DOI:10.2337/dc24-S001
